---
title: "05: Exit Survey Responses"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

data_dir <- here("analysis", "processed_data")
```

# Load & Clean

```{r load-data}
players_raw <- read_csv(
  file.path(data_dir, "players.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

games <- read_csv(
  file.path(data_dir, "games.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Keep only players from real games (non-NA condition) with survey data
real_game_ids <- games %>% filter(!is.na(condition)) %>% pull(gameId)

survey <- players_raw %>%
  filter(gameId %in% real_game_ids) %>%
  filter(!is.na(exitSurvey_age)) %>%
  left_join(games %>% select(gameId, condition), by = "gameId") %>%
  rename_with(~ str_remove(., "^exitSurvey_")) %>%
  mutate(gender = str_to_lower(gender))

cat("Players with survey data:", nrow(survey), "\n")
cat("Conditions:", paste(unique(survey$condition), collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

# Demographics

```{r age-summary}
survey %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(age),
    median = median(age),
    min = min(age),
    max = max(age),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Age summary by condition")
```

```{r gender}
survey %>%
  count(condition, gender) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Gender distribution by condition")

ggplot(survey, aes(x = gender, fill = originalGroup)) +
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(A = "steelblue", B = "coral", C = "forestgreen")) +
  facet_wrap(~condition) +
  labs(title = "Gender by group", x = "Gender", y = "Count", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r education}
survey %>%
  count(condition, education) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Education distribution by condition")

ggplot(survey, aes(x = education, fill = originalGroup)) +
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(A = "steelblue", B = "coral", C = "forestgreen")) +
  facet_wrap(~condition) +
  labs(title = "Education by group", x = "Education", y = "Count", fill = "Group") +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Comprehension & Pay Fairness

```{r comprehension-fairness}
survey %>%
  select(condition, playerId, originalName, originalGroup, understood, fair) %>%
  arrange(condition, originalGroup) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Comprehension and pay fairness")
```

# Strategy

```{r strategy}
survey %>%
  select(condition, playerId, originalName, originalGroup, strength) %>%
  arrange(condition, originalGroup) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Strategy descriptions")
```

# Open Feedback

```{r feedback}
survey %>%
  select(condition, playerId, originalName, originalGroup, feedback) %>%
  arrange(condition, originalGroup) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Open feedback")
```

# Full Response Table

```{r full-table}
survey %>%
  select(condition, playerId, originalName, originalGroup, age, gender, education,
         understood, fair, strength, feedback) %>%
  arrange(condition, originalGroup) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "All exit survey responses")
```
